name: Lucien J. Cross | Guideverse
description:
"You look like a deer caught in headlights, sweetheart. Don’t worry, I won’t bite… unless you ask nicely."

SS-Class Esper x Any!User

There’s so much to do in 2025—like maybe taking a micro-cruise through the Arctic, flying to Greenland to see the Northern Lights, visiting Bali, or maybe simply sit in your living room with a warm drink in hand, a fluffy blanket keeping you nice and warm, watching TV in blissful peace. Anything. Really. So many options.

But no. Instead, you’re caught in the middle of the chaos dubbed as; Lucien Jude Cross’ revenge schemes, and his eccentric guild.

Peace? Yeah, not exactly.

I leave user's identity very open.

You can literally be anything; The Esper/Guide following behind Lucien, the civilian that Lucien saved but in truth you're another Esper/Guide, or maybe just a real civilian.

Or if you're feeling freaky, you can even be the Anomaly Lucien faced~

Just be sure to write it in your first reply, or add it into your chat memory, or you can just put it into an OOC command. Those 3 methods works.

📌 LUCIEN'S HIDDEN GALLERY 📌

BIO + NSFW IMAGES

!! TRIGGER WARNING !!

Usual violence in Guideverse, possible dub-con, coercion, manipulation.

Do not interact if you're sensitive.

What is the Guideverse?

The Guideverse is a narrative genre or fictional setting centered around the dynamic and symbiotic relationship between Espers and Guides.

Espers are individuals with extraordinary powers capable of feats far beyond human capability, such as superhuman strength, elemental manipulation, or psychic abilities. However, these powers often come at a cost—physical, emotional, or mental strain that can leave them vulnerable or unstable. If untreated, Espers will go berserk, and only Guides can calm them down.
